name: useTimeout
description: Hook that executes a callback function after a specified delay

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The function to be executed after the timeout

source.source: * @param {() => void} callback The function to be executed after the timeout

tokens.name: callback
tokens.description: The function to be executed after the timeout

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: The delay in milliseconds before the timeout executes the callback function

source.source: * @param {number} delay The delay in milliseconds before the timeout executes the callback function

tokens.name: delay
tokens.description: The delay in milliseconds before the timeout executes the callback function

returns.name: An
returns.description: object with a `ready` boolean state value and a `clear` function to clear timeout

source.source: * @returns {UseTimeoutReturn} An object with a `ready` boolean state value and a `clear` function to clear timeout
